actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && nmcli radio wifi on || nmcli radio wifi off'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(nmcli radio wifi) == "enabled" ]] && echo true || echo false'

actions.command: sh -c 'if [ "$SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE" = "true" ]; then bluetoothctl power on; else bluetoothctl power off; fi'
actions.update-command: bluetoothctl show | grep -q "Powered: yes" && echo true || echo false

actions.command: if [ "$SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE" = "true" ]; then hyprctl dispatch exec "hyprsunset --temperature 6000"; else pkill -INT hyprsunset; fi
actions.update-command: pgrep -x hyprsunset >/dev/null && echo true || echo false

actions.command: if [ "$SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE" = "true" ]; then hyprctl dispatch exec hypridle; else pkill -TERM hypridle; fi
actions.update-command: pgrep -x hypridle >/dev/null && echo true || echo false
